title: Ryanair to Create 450 Jobs in £40m Prestwick Airport Expansion

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Ryanair has confirmed a significant investment of £40 million aimed at expanding its operations at Prestwick Airport. This investment is expected to create approximately 450 new jobs, boosting local employment in the area.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The expansion reflects Ryanair's continued commitment to growing its presence in the UK aviation market. The job creation is anticipated to have positive economic implications for the region, contributing to job growth and enhancing the airport's operational capabilities.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Ryanair to create 450 jobs in £40m Prestwick Airport expansion
